docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE 11/22/25. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MATHEW ELLENBERGER. (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A REGULAR JUDGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY ELLENBERGER, MATHEW FORTMAN, NOEL AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, WALTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-02-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MATHEW ELLENBERGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALTER HUGHES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. MO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $160.00 SERVED AUG-12-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, WALTER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-28-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS MATHEW ELLENBERGER AND NOEL FORTMAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALTER HUGHES IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MATHEW ELLENBERGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALTER HUGHES IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 07/07/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLENBERGER, MATHEW FORTMAN, NOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUGHES, WALTER $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $235.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,735.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DENNIS LIAM
